title: No nvm_add for creating new objects
description: nvm.rs: The only write path is nvm_overwrite, which deletes the existing object before adding. There is no nvm_add API for creating a new object that does not already exist. A user who calls nvm_overwrite on a fresh ID will get an error from nvm_delete (which is the correct behaviour), but nvm_overwrite's name and doc imply it requires a pre-existing object without stating this explicitly. Add doc language clarifying that nvm_overwrite requires the object to already exist, and/or add an nvm_add for the create-only path, so callers are not surprised at 2am by a delete-fails-on-new-id error.
